narrative:
Page Manor (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,115 registered voters, with 82.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.6 percentage points.
